original_snippet_context: The author discusses broader social and economic changes, including financial institutions and economic instruments that would uplift workers and families.
relevant_quote: Caixas econômicos profusamente espalhadas recolherão ?6 vin tens das bolsas escassas- fazendo viver o modr-or.O sentimento dn previdência humana.
justification: While mentioning "Caixas econômicos" (savings banks), the context relates to general social progress and worker welfare, not specifically to the "Caixa de Conversão" debated in the 1906 monetary reform. There's no discussion of conversion rates, gold standard, or any other elements related to the monetary debates.
